case_title: MARIAN C PAROCHA VS. MAYETTE ADRIANO ARRIOLLA ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2024 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,250.00 FILED BY PAROCHA, MARIAN C AS TO DEFENDANT ARRIOLLA, MAYETTE ADRIANO GONZALEZ, KAREEN NOGUERA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PAROCHA, MARIAN C ARRIOLLA, MAYETTE ADRIANO GONZALEZ, KAREEN NOGUERA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-24-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-24-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF MARIAN C. PAROCHA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS MAYETTE ADRIANO ARRIOLLA AND KAREEN NOGUERA GONZALEZ ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CURTIS SMOLAR; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAROCHA, MARIAN C RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARRIOLLA, MAYETTE ADRIANO GONZALEZ, KAREEN NOGUERA $2,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,775.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO ORDER FILED ON 8/4/2025. (SEE MANAGER FOR ORDER.)
